words.example: The search engine uses a complex algorithm to rank millions of web pages instantly.
words.exampleZh: 这个搜索引擎使用一种复杂的算法，瞬间为数百万个网页排序。

words.example: Constant innovation in smartphones has completely changed the way we communicate.
words.exampleZh: 智能手机领域不断的创新彻底改变了我们的交流方式。

words.example: Many companies now rely on artificial intelligence to handle customer enquiries.
words.exampleZh: 如今许多公司依靠人工智能来处理客户咨询。

words.example: Wearable devices can monitor your heart rate throughout the entire day.
words.exampleZh: 可穿戴设备能够全天监测你的心率。

words.example: Students attended a virtual classroom and discussed the topic from their homes.
words.exampleZh: 学生们参加了一个虚拟课堂，在各自家中讨论这个话题。

words.example: The library has converted thousands of old books into a digital format.
words.exampleZh: 这家图书馆已将数千本旧书转换成数字格式。

words.example: A reliable network connection is essential for working from home efficiently.
words.exampleZh: 稳定的网络连接对于高效地居家办公至关重要。

words.example: The new software allows designers to create three-dimensional models with ease.
words.exampleZh: 这款新软件让设计师能够轻松创建三维模型。

words.example: The factory installed an automatic system that packs the products without human help.
words.exampleZh: 这家工厂安装了一套无需人工帮助即可包装产品的自动系统。

words.example: You can access your bank account securely through the official mobile application.
words.exampleZh: 你可以通过官方手机应用安全地访问自己的银行账户。

words.example: The company decided to upgrade all its computers before the busy season began.
words.exampleZh: 公司决定在繁忙季节开始前升级所有电脑。

words.example: Scientists analysed the data carefully before publishing their conclusions.
words.exampleZh: 科学家们在发表结论之前仔细分析了这些数据。

words.example: Engineers managed to automate the boring tasks that workers once did by hand.
words.exampleZh: 工程师们成功地将工人过去手工完成的枯燥任务自动化了。

words.example: She likes to browse online stores during her lunch break for new clothes.
words.exampleZh: 她喜欢在午休时浏览网店挑选新衣服。

words.example: Thanks to modern technology, remote work has become increasingly common worldwide.
words.exampleZh: 得益于现代科技，远程办公在全球范围内变得越来越普遍。

words.example: This online platform connects teachers and students from many different countries.
words.exampleZh: 这个在线平台把来自许多不同国家的师生联系在一起。

words.example: The updated app is far more efficient and saves users a lot of time.
words.exampleZh: 更新后的应用高效得多，为用户节省了大量时间。

words.example: Satellites transmit signals that allow us to watch live broadcasts from abroad.
words.exampleZh: 卫星传输信号，使我们能够观看来自国外的现场直播。

words.example: A clear and simple interface makes the program easy for beginners to use.
words.exampleZh: 清晰简洁的界面使这个程序便于初学者使用。

words.example: The bank encrypts every transaction to protect its customers from online theft.
words.exampleZh: 银行对每笔交易进行加密，以保护客户免遭网络盗窃。

words.example: Air pollution in large cities poses a serious threat to public health.
words.exampleZh: 大城市的空气污染对公共健康构成严重威胁。

words.example: The government is encouraging farmers to adopt more sustainable methods of production.
words.exampleZh: 政府正鼓励农民采用更可持续的生产方式。

words.example: If we recycle paper and plastic, we can greatly reduce household waste.
words.exampleZh: 如果我们回收纸张和塑料，就能大大减少家庭垃圾。

words.example: Protecting the natural environment is a responsibility shared by everyone on the planet.
words.exampleZh: 保护自然环境是地球上每个人共同的责任。

words.example: Reducing carbon emission is the key to slowing down global warming.
words.exampleZh: 减少碳排放是减缓全球变暖的关键。

words.example: Many endangered species will disappear forever unless we act quickly to save them.
words.exampleZh: 除非我们迅速采取行动拯救它们，许多濒危物种将永远消失。

words.example: Local communities are working hard to preserve the forests for future generations.
words.exampleZh: 当地社区正在努力为子孙后代保护这些森林。

words.example: Solar power is a clean and renewable source of energy for the future.
words.exampleZh: 太阳能是一种清洁且可再生的未来能源。

words.example: Cutting down forests can destroy a delicate ecosystem that took centuries to form.
words.exampleZh: 砍伐森林可能毁掉一个历经数百年才形成的脆弱生态系统。

words.example: Water conservation is essential in regions where rainfall is extremely limited.
words.exampleZh: 在降雨极为有限的地区，节约用水至关重要。

words.example: Chemical waste from the factory may contaminate the river that supplies the town.
words.exampleZh: 工厂的化学废料可能污染为该镇供水的河流。

words.example: Scientists warn that climate change could lead to more frequent extreme weather.
words.exampleZh: 科学家警告说，气候变化可能导致更频繁的极端天气。

words.example: Widespread deforestation has driven countless animals out of their natural habitats.
words.exampleZh: 大规模的森林砍伐已将无数动物赶出了它们的自然栖息地。

words.example: The new dam threatens the natural habitat of several rare fish species.
words.exampleZh: 这座新水坝威胁着几种珍稀鱼类的自然栖息地。

words.example: Factories must dispose of their waste safely instead of dumping it into rivers.
words.exampleZh: 工厂必须安全地处理废料，而不是把它倒入河中。

words.example: Tackling pollution requires global cooperation among governments and ordinary citizens alike.
words.exampleZh: 解决污染问题需要各国政府与普通民众之间的全球合作。

words.example: Tropical rainforests are famous for their astonishing biodiversity and unique plants.
words.exampleZh: 热带雨林以其惊人的生物多样性和独特的植物而闻名。

words.example: A long drought destroyed the crops and left many farmers in despair.
words.exampleZh: 长期的干旱毁坏了庄稼，使许多农民陷入绝望。

words.example: The campaign aims to raise public awareness about the dangers of plastic waste.
words.exampleZh: 这场活动旨在提高公众对塑料垃圾危害的意识。

words.meaning: 化石（fossil fuel 化石燃料）
words.example: Burning fossil fuels releases harmful gases that warm the entire planet.
words.exampleZh: 燃烧化石燃料会释放出使整个地球变暖的有害气体。

words.example: Regular exercise improves both your physical fitness and your mental well-being.
words.exampleZh: 规律的锻炼能改善你的身体健康和心理状态。

words.example: Good nutrition during childhood is vital for healthy growth and strong bones.
words.exampleZh: 童年时期良好的营养对健康成长和强壮的骨骼至关重要。

words.example: Doctors advise patients to exercise for at least thirty minutes every day.
words.exampleZh: 医生建议病人每天至少锻炼三十分钟。

words.example: The athlete missed the whole season because of a serious knee injury.
words.exampleZh: 这名运动员因严重的膝盖受伤而错过了整个赛季。

words.example: Long-distance running gradually builds up the endurance that marathon runners need.
words.exampleZh: 长跑能逐渐培养马拉松选手所需的耐力。

words.example: A balanced diet rich in vegetables can lower the risk of many diseases.
words.exampleZh: 富含蔬菜的均衡饮食可以降低许多疾病的风险。

words.example: Lifting weights regularly helps you build strong muscle and improve your posture.
words.exampleZh: 定期举重有助于你增强肌肉并改善姿势。

words.example: It took the player several weeks to recover fully from his ankle injury.
words.exampleZh: 这名球员花了好几周才从脚踝伤势中完全康复。

words.example: Plenty of sleep and good food keep your immune system strong and healthy.
words.exampleZh: 充足的睡眠和良好的饮食能使你的免疫系统保持强健。

words.example: Physical activity is just as important for teenagers as their academic studies.
words.exampleZh: 对青少年来说，身体活动和学业一样重要。

words.example: Swimming every morning has greatly improved her stamina over the past year.
words.exampleZh: 过去一年里，每天早晨游泳极大地提高了她的体力。

words.example: Childhood obesity has become a growing concern in many developed countries.
words.exampleZh: 儿童肥胖已成为许多发达国家日益关注的问题。

words.example: A professional athlete must train hard and follow a strict daily routine.
words.exampleZh: 职业运动员必须刻苦训练并遵守严格的日常安排。

words.example: Fresh fruits provide the vitamin C that helps your body fight infections.
words.exampleZh: 新鲜水果提供维生素C，有助于身体抵抗感染。

words.example: Stretching every day will gradually make your body more flexible and relaxed.
words.exampleZh: 每天拉伸会逐渐使你的身体更加柔韧和放松。

words.example: The school introduced new programmes to support the emotional wellbeing of students.
words.exampleZh: 学校推出了新项目以支持学生的情感安康。

words.example: After an intense workout, it is important to drink water and rest.
words.exampleZh: 在剧烈运动之后，喝水和休息很重要。

words.example: Washing your hands frequently can prevent the spread of common illnesses.
words.exampleZh: 勤洗手可以预防常见疾病的传播。

words.example: Sitting with good posture for long hours protects your back from pain.
words.exampleZh: 长时间保持良好的坐姿能保护你的背部免受疼痛。

words.example: Athletes should hydrate properly before, during and after every demanding match.
words.exampleZh: 运动员应在每场高强度比赛前、中、后适当补水。

words.example: Celebrating the Spring Festival with family is a long-standing tradition in China.
words.exampleZh: 与家人一起庆祝春节是中国一项历史悠久的传统。

words.example: The ancient town was listed as a world heritage site by UNESCO.
words.exampleZh: 这座古镇被联合国教科文组织列为世界遗产。

words.example: The graduation ceremony was held in the grand hall of the university.
words.exampleZh: 毕业典礼在大学的大礼堂举行。

words.example: It is a local custom to offer tea to guests when they arrive.
words.exampleZh: 客人到来时奉茶是当地的一种习俗。

words.example: During the festival, the streets were decorated with bright red lanterns.
words.exampleZh: 节日期间，街道上装饰着鲜红的灯笼。

words.example: Many families return home to honour their ancestors during this traditional holiday.
words.exampleZh: 许多家庭在这个传统节日期间回到家乡祭拜祖先。

words.example: The tea ritual has been passed down through countless generations in this region.
words.exampleZh: 这种茶道仪式在这个地区已经流传了无数代人。

words.example: Language is an important part of a nation's cultural identity and history.
words.exampleZh: 语言是一个民族文化认同和历史的重要组成部分。

words.example: Our city is home to people from diverse cultural and religious backgrounds.
words.exampleZh: 我们的城市是来自不同文化和宗教背景人们的家园。

words.example: The museum displays many ancient objects discovered in nearby underground tombs.
words.exampleZh: 博物馆展出许多在附近地下墓穴中发现的古代文物。

words.example: Children often inherit certain values and beliefs from their parents and grandparents.
words.exampleZh: 孩子们常常从父母和祖父母那里继承某些价值观和信念。

words.example: Ancient Chinese civilization made remarkable contributions to science, art and philosophy.
words.exampleZh: 古代中华文明在科学、艺术和哲学方面做出了卓越的贡献。

words.example: In many cultures, the dove is regarded as a symbol of peace.
words.exampleZh: 在许多文化中，鸽子被视为和平的象征。

words.example: Local artists work hard to keep alive a craft that is slowly disappearing.
words.exampleZh: 当地艺术家努力让一门正在慢慢消失的手工艺存续下去。

words.example: Grandmother often shared old folklore about brave heroes and clever animals.
words.exampleZh: 祖母常常讲述关于勇敢英雄和聪明动物的古老民间传说。

words.example: People all over the country gathered to celebrate the arrival of the new year.
words.exampleZh: 全国各地的人们聚集在一起庆祝新年的到来。

words.example: The country is proud of the colourful costumes of its many ethnic groups.
words.exampleZh: 这个国家为其众多民族色彩缤纷的服饰而自豪。

words.example: The famous monument attracts thousands of visitors from around the world each year.
words.exampleZh: 这座著名的古迹每年吸引来自世界各地的成千上万游客。

words.example: The writer left behind a rich literary legacy that still inspires young readers.
words.exampleZh: 这位作家留下了丰富的文学遗产，至今仍激励着年轻读者。

words.example: Different communities have lived together in harmony in this town for centuries.
words.exampleZh: 不同的社群在这个小镇上和谐共处已有几个世纪。

words.example: A good education opens many doors and shapes a young person's future.
words.exampleZh: 良好的教育能开启许多大门，并塑造年轻人的未来。

words.example: She gained a great deal of knowledge by reading widely and asking questions.
words.exampleZh: 她通过广泛阅读和提出问题获得了大量知识。

words.example: His academic performance improved greatly after he developed better study habits.
words.exampleZh: 在养成了更好的学习习惯后，他的学业成绩有了很大提高。

words.example: She won a full scholarship to study engineering at a famous university.
words.exampleZh: 她获得了一所著名大学工程专业的全额奖学金。

words.example: The new curriculum places greater emphasis on creativity and independent thinking.
words.exampleZh: 新课程更加注重创造力和独立思考。

words.example: With patience and effort, you can achieve almost any goal you set.
words.exampleZh: 凭借耐心和努力，你几乎可以实现自己设定的任何目标。

words.example: Her greatest ambition is to become a doctor and help people in poor areas.
words.exampleZh: 她最大的抱负是成为一名医生，帮助贫困地区的人们。

words.example: Most employers expect candidates to have a relevant qualification and some experience.
words.exampleZh: 大多数雇主期望应聘者具备相关学历和一些经验。

words.example: A good teacher knows how to motivate students who have lost their confidence.
words.exampleZh: 好老师懂得如何激励那些失去信心的学生。

words.example: Every child has the potential to succeed if given the right support.
words.exampleZh: 如果给予恰当的支持，每个孩子都有成功的潜力。

words.example: After he graduates from college, he plans to work abroad for a year.
words.exampleZh: 大学毕业后，他打算出国工作一年。

words.example: Success in any field requires hard work, patience and a great deal of discipline.
words.exampleZh: 在任何领域取得成功都需要努力、耐心和极强的自律。

words.example: She is determined to build a successful career in scientific research.
words.exampleZh: 她决心在科学研究领域建立一份成功的事业。

words.example: University offers many opportunities for intellectual growth and personal development.
words.exampleZh: 大学提供了许多促进智力成长和个人发展的机会。

words.example: Students spent months preparing for the final examination at the end of the year.
words.exampleZh: 学生们花了几个月时间准备年底的期末考试。

words.example: Parents should encourage their children to explore new subjects without fear of failure.
words.exampleZh: 父母应鼓励孩子探索新学科，不必害怕失败。

words.example: The rising cost of tuition has made higher education harder for some families.
words.exampleZh: 不断上涨的学费使一些家庭更难负担高等教育。

words.example: The school holds an annual show to celebrate the talent of its students.
words.exampleZh: 学校每年举办一场演出，以展现学生们的才能。

words.example: Learning should be a lifelong process rather than something limited to school.
words.exampleZh: 学习应当是一个终身的过程，而不只是局限于学校。

words.example: The job market is highly competitive, so good skills really make a difference.
words.exampleZh: 就业市场竞争激烈，因此优秀的技能确实能带来不同。

words.example: Learning to manage your emotion is an important part of growing up.
words.exampleZh: 学会管理自己的情绪是成长过程中重要的一部分。

words.example: She felt deep sympathy for the families who had lost their homes.
words.exampleZh: 她对那些失去家园的家庭深表同情。

words.example: Honesty and respect are the foundation of trust between close friends.
words.exampleZh: 诚实和尊重是亲密朋友之间信任的基础。

words.example: I really appreciate the way you helped me when I was in trouble.
words.exampleZh: 我真心感激你在我陷入困境时帮助我的方式。

words.example: A loyal friend will stand by you even in the most difficult times.
words.exampleZh: 忠诚的朋友即使在最艰难的时刻也会陪在你身边。

words.example: Good communication can help us resolve a conflict before it becomes serious.
words.exampleZh: 良好的沟通能帮助我们在冲突变得严重之前解决它。

words.example: Showing empathy means trying to understand how another person truly feels.
words.exampleZh: 表现出同理心意味着努力去理解另一个人真正的感受。

words.example: The old couple still show great affection for each other after many years.
words.exampleZh: 这对老夫妻经过多年依然彼此关爱有加。

words.example: In a diverse society, we must learn to tolerate different opinions and habits.
words.exampleZh: 在多元的社会里，我们必须学会包容不同的观点和习惯。

words.example: Please accept my sincere apology for the trouble I caused you yesterday.
words.exampleZh: 请接受我为昨天给你带来的麻烦所表达的真诚歉意。

words.example: His dog has been a faithful companion to him for over ten years.
words.exampleZh: 他的狗十多年来一直是他忠实的伙伴。

words.example: She tried to comfort her friend, who was crying after the sad news.
words.exampleZh: 她努力安慰她的朋友，那位朋友在听到噩耗后哭了。

words.example: We are deeply grateful to everyone who supported us during these hard months.
words.exampleZh: 我们对在这些艰难的月份里支持我们的每个人都深表感激。

words.example: He felt a little jealous when his best friend won the first prize.
words.exampleZh: 当他最好的朋友赢得头奖时，他感到有点嫉妒。

words.example: Her warm words consoled me and gave me courage after my failure.
words.exampleZh: 她温暖的话语安慰了我，在我失败后给了我勇气。

words.example: They share an intimate friendship built on years of mutual support.
words.exampleZh: 他们之间有一段建立在多年相互支持之上的亲密友谊。

words.example: Holding on to resentment will only make you feel more unhappy inside.
words.exampleZh: 一直怀着怨恨只会让你内心更加不快乐。

words.example: The nurse treated every patient with patience and genuine compassion.
words.exampleZh: 这位护士以耐心和真诚的同情对待每一位病人。

words.example: After a long argument, the two brothers finally managed to reconcile.
words.exampleZh: 在一场长时间的争吵之后，兄弟俩终于和好了。

words.example: It was very considerate of you to remember my birthday this year.
words.exampleZh: 你今年记得我的生日，真是非常体贴。
